untranslatable_reason: Signal requires intraday time-of-day logic (1:00 p.m. evaluation window) and rally detection after open, which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The signal depends on: (1) detecting a rally that occurred between open and 1:00 p.m., (2) confirming price has returned to opening price specifically by 1:00 p.m., and (3) inferring intraday strength patterns. The allowed indicators operate on OHLC bars without intraday timestamp or session-relative positioning. Time-of-day conditions and intraday rally detection are not supported.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_15 is an intraday mean reversion signal tied to specific market hours (1:00 p.m. checkpoint). A minimal approximation (close == open at bar close) was provided, but this does not capture the true intraday rally-and-return pattern the author described. Proper implementation requires intraday bar data with timestamp filtering.
